title: Fix MCPResponse.id to use null for notifications (JSON-RPC 2.0)
description: src/mcp/MCPServer.ts: 9 sites return `request.id ?? undefined` for notifications. JSON-RPC 2.0 spec requires `id: null` for notifications. Use `request.id ?? null` and tighten MCPResponse.id type to `string | number | null`.
validation: Read MCPServer.ts, confirm all id returns use ?? null. Update MCPResponse.id type. Run typecheck.
